steps.title: Track the flight mechanism
steps.content: The previous sentence says that above the Karman line, an aircraft no longer remains aloft using lift. The next sentence explains the replacement mechanism: the aircraft sustains flight primarily by velocity.

steps.title: Signal replacement
steps.content: Choice A signals that something happens despite other conditions, not that one mechanism replaces another. Choice B introduces an example. Choice C introduces a concession. The sentence needs a transition showing that velocity takes the place of lift as the basis for flight. The answer is D.
